overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting the interior of a rustic stone cottage with a burning fireplace. The player slowly approaches a woman warming herself by the fire, eventually picking up a floor lamp and observing her as she moves away toward the back of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage living room with stone fireplace

events.description: a woman enters the room from the right side and approaches the fireplace

agents.ego_description: slowly walking toward the fireplace while observing the cozy interior

notable_agents.action: entering the room and walking toward the fireplace to warm herself

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with active fire burning inside
green plaid rug covering the wooden floor in the seating area
simple wooden chair with curved backrest
wooden dining table against the back wall
tall floor lamp with blue glass base and black metal shade
lit wall-mounted sconces providing warm ambient light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dimly lit stone cottage interior centered around a burning fireplace. The room contains wooden furniture arranged on a green tartan rug. A woman enters from the right and approaches the fireplace as the camera slowly moves forward.

agents.ego_description: continuing to approach the woman standing by the fireplace

notable_agents.action: standing by the fireplace warming her hands and looking toward the flames

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its slow approach toward the fireplace where the woman stands warming herself. The warm firelight illuminates the stone walls and wooden floor. The floor lamp moves from the right foreground toward the center as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: close interaction zone by the hearth

events.description: player character picks up the floor lamp, holding it in the foreground
the woman turns away from the fireplace and walks toward the back of the room

agents.ego_description: holding a lamp and observing the woman closely as she moves away from the fire

notable_agents.action: turning away from the fireplace and walking toward the table area in the back

segments.scene_description: The player picks up the floor lamp, bringing it close to the camera as they approach the woman. She turns away from the fireplace and walks toward the back of the room, passing the wooden table and chairs. The camera follows her movement, revealing more of the stone-walled interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dimly lit stone cottage that shifts from a focused view of a hearth to a wider exploration of the room. It begins with a slow advance toward a burning fireplace where a woman enters from the right to warm herself, her presence drawing the camera deeper into the space. As the camera moves forward, the warm firelight increasingly illuminates the stone walls and wooden furniture arranged on a green tartan rug. The scene then shifts as the player picks up a floor lamp from the foreground, bringing it into view while the woman turns and walks toward the back of the room. Finally, the camera follows her past a wooden table and chairs, revealing the further reaches of the rustic interior.
